name: 2026-06-03 Political Commentary Senate Walkout TH
description:
Ganun kalala.

A sitting senator was arrested for plunder Monday. The chamber's response was to skip session.

The bills that did not move because the Senate walked out:

Magna Carta of Barangay Health Workers. 250,000 BHWs, still waiting.
Anti-Hospital Detention Bill.
Confirmations of military and police officials.

One arrest. A chamber on strike.

Ganun kalala.

A sitting senator was arrested for plunder Monday. The chamber's response was to skip session.

The bills that did not move because the Senate walked out:

Magna Carta of Barangay Health Workers. 250,000 BHWs, still waiting.
Anti-Hospital Detention Bill.
Confirmations of military and police officials.

One arrest. A chamber on strike.

Senate failed to convene 2026-06-01 after majority bloc no-show following sitting senator's plunder arrest. Bills stalled include Magna Carta of Barangay Health Workers (250k+ BHWs nationwide), Anti-Hospital Detention Bill, military/police confirmations. Solid Bloc 11 minority called it a 'boycott of duty.'
